{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,

    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” primarily calls for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering the scientific content.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty around claims and conditions (e.g., ‘mild observability condition’).",
    "RX.2": "Avoid strengthening or expanding claims beyond what the reported evidence supports while tightening language.",
    "RX.3": "Constrain work to polishing and minor clarity improvements rather than reworking argument structure or contributions.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure wording does not imply unwarranted practical reliability in bioactivity prediction that could mislead downstream use.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain the provenance of all reported settings, numbers, and findings so the edited text remains traceable to the original artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” primarily calls for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering the scientific content.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty around claims and conditions (e.g., ‘mild observability condition’).
rationale.RX.2: Avoid strengthening or expanding claims beyond what the reported evidence supports while tightening language.
rationale.RX.3: Constrain work to polishing and minor clarity improvements rather than reworking argument structure or contributions.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure wording does not imply unwarranted practical reliability in bioactivity prediction that could mislead downstream use.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain the provenance of all reported settings, numbers, and findings so the edited text remains traceable to the original artifact.
